form.formComment: Well-beaten 19 days ago at Albion Park over 2138m, before that 6th (Fr3) over 1850m after showing early speed at Marburg, beaten 30 m by Ghost Train (2:16.70) in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on March 15 at $41. Needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Yielded ground over the concluding stages of the event.
Shifted ground under pressure in the run to the finish.
Commenced a three wide move with a lap remaining

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr2) over 1780m at this track, beaten 11 m by Miss Hattie (2:12.40) in 3yo+ NR up to 40 on April 2 at $10. Before that, a solid effort when 2nd (Fr1) over 1780m after showing early pace at this track beaten 3 m by Rocknroll Da Gama (2:13.90) in 3yo+ NR up to 39 on March 26 at $8. Rates highly. Sure to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted the near-side sulky tyre of Doc Harvey rounding the final turn.

form.formComment: Recent form below what she is capable of. Last start 9th (Fr3) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 9 m by Copy Writer (2:03.00) in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on March 30 at $8.50. At the previous start was well back in the run when 9th (Fr3) over 2138m after showing early pace at Albion Park beaten 16 m by Gracenava (2:37.90) in 3yo+ NR up to 41 on March 6 at $126. Same draw this time and can do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in for a short distance entering the first turn.
Locked stays with Captain Oh Captain in the home straight.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 6th (Sr1) over 1780m at this track, beaten 40 m by Get Me Outta Here (2:12.20) in 3yo+ NR up to 37 on March 8 at $13. Before that was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr4) over 1780m after racing wide at this track, beaten 30 m by Yogi (2:12.70) in 3yo+ NR up to 39 on February 26 at $41. Must do a lot more.
